briefdescription.para: Below is the bit mapping of fields in the ATF Handoff parameters with that of Prtn header.

detaileddescription.para: The number of bits shifted is is based on the difference between these two offsets ATFHandoffParams PrtnHdr Shift Parameter PrtnFlags PrtnAttrb difference
Exec State 0 3 3 right ENDIAN 1 18 17 right SECURE 2 0 2 left EL 3:4 1:2 2 left CPU_A78 5:6 8:11 Cluster# 11:12 29:31 18 right Reserved 13:16

briefdescription.para: Offset to the metaheader offset field present in boot header.
Boot header address in PRAM copied by ROM.
MetaHeader HashBlock address in PRAM copied by ROM.
This function will return the value of Destination Cluster field.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the Partition Header

briefdescription.para: This function will return the value of Cluster lockstep field.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the Partition Header

briefdescription.para: This function will return the value of A78 Execution State field.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the Partition Header

briefdescription.para: This is the header file which contains versal_2ve_2vm specific definitions for the PDI.

para.preformatted: Ver Who Date Changes ----- ---- -------- ------------------------------------------------------- 1.10 kal 24/07/2024 Initial release 1.11 sk 03/05/2025 Added ASU destination CPU attribute sk 03/17/2025 Updated Header attributes for RPU clusters
